item_name: Heat the soldering iron and melt solder on the tip while wearing safety goggles completion note
prompt:
A process-specific completion note documenting heating a soldering iron and melting solder on the tip while wearing safety goggles. The image shows a soldering station with the iron resting safely in its stand, a small coil of solder, protective goggles nearby or partially in frame, and a completion note with tool-prep sequence blocks and safety icons suggested without readable text. The moment should emphasize tip tinning and responsible setup rather than active hazardous work.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future electronics-workshop aesthetic: soft bench lighting, realistic metal tip, silicone grip, reflective solder, and paper textures, no logos, no readable labels, no unsafe behavior, and no identifiable faces. Keep the iron stand, goggles, and note central so the preparation step is unmistakable.
